name: BEZELAK
description: A towering, gray-green frog beast with fangs, four flaming eyes, and rubbery bones. It can squeeze its slimy, dragon-sized bulk into narrow spaces.
statblock: AC 15, HP 75, ATK 3 rend +9 (2d10) and 1 fire belch, MV double near (climb), S +5, D +2, C +3, I -2, W +3, Ch -3, AL C, LV 16

abilities.name: Fire Belch
abilities.description: Fills a near-sized cube extending from bezelak. DC 15 DEX or 4d10 damage.

abilities.name: Bezoar
abilities.description: Has 1d4 orange-sized stones inside its gut worth 500 gp each. They are random Utility magic items (SD pg. 291).

name: DREMIR
description: Grey-skinned, eyeless people with bat-like ears and noses. Their silk clothes and cultured bearing masks a hidden malice.
statblock: AC 11, HP 14, ATK 1 rend +3 (1d6) or 1 spell +3, MV near, S +0, D +2, C +1, I +2, W +1, Ch +1, AL C, LV 3

abilities.name: Impale (INT Spell)
abilities.description: DC 12. Far range. Target takes 1d6 damage.

abilities.name: Slow (INT Spell)
abilities.description: DC 12. One target in near moves at half speed for 1d4 rounds.

name: LIBRARIAN OF LENG
description: A purple-skinned fiend in flowing morzo silk robes. A gold headdress covers its ears and eyes, revealing only gaunt, grinning lips and ragged teeth.
statblock: AC 14, HP 28, ATK 1 bite +3 (1d6) or 2 spells +6, MV near, S +1, D +2, C +1, I +4, W +3, Ch +2, AL C, LV 6

abilities.name: Impervious
abilities.description: Only damaged by silver or magical sources.

abilities.name: Overwhelm
abilities.description: DISADV on checks if its eyes or ears are uncovered.

abilities.name: Absorb (INT Spell)
abilities.description: DC 13. One target in far loses a random spell and librarian regains a lost spell.

abilities.name: Eye of the Master (INT Spell)
abilities.description: DC 15. One target in far, one effect: Confuse — target attacks a random ally on turn; Disintegrate — target takes 3d6 damage; Telekinesis — hover the target up to a double near distance.

abilities.name: Invoke Fear (INT Spell)
abilities.description: DC 12. One creature in near cannot move into close range of librarian for 1d4 rounds.

abilities.name: Mind Pierce (INT Spell)
abilities.description: DC 13. One creature in far 2d6 damage and blinded for one round.

name: NULN
description: Lost miners, overconfident explorers, or unlucky delvers who fell prey to The Chittering.
statblock: AC 12 (leather), HP 13, ATK 2 spear (close/near) +3 (1d6), MV near, S +1, D +1, C +0, I +0, W +0, Ch -4, AL C, LV 3

abilities.name: Rage
abilities.description: 1/day, immune to morale checks, +1d4 damage (3 rounds).

abilities.name: Contagious Madness
abilities.description: DC 12 CHA when first speaking with the nuln or 1 point of CHA damage.

name: MORZO MOTH
description: Longboat-sized moths with snowy wings and hooked, grasping mandibles. Their silk is prized for its immense durability.
statblock: AC 16, HP 37, ATK 2 bite +6 (2d6 + grab) and 1 wing dust, MV double near (fly), S +4, D +3, C +1, I -3, W +1, Ch -3, AL N, LV 8

abilities.name: Grab
abilities.description: DC 15 STR or target held. DC 15 STR on turn to break free. Bite attacks automatically hit grabbed targets.

abilities.name: Wing Dust
abilities.description: All creatures in near DC 12 CON or lose half their current HP (round down). This can't take creatures below 1 HP.

name: WENDEL
description: Cow-sized slugs with eye stalks. They leave meandering slime trails. Most are carnivorous.
statblock: AC 9, HP 11, ATK 1 slam +2 (1d6), MV near (climb), S +2, D -1, C +2, I -3, W +0, Ch -3, AL N, LV 2

abilities.name: Sticky
abilities.description: Can climb and cling to sheer surfaces effortlessly.

abilities.name: Type
abilities.description: Roll a d8: 1 Pearly — docile herbivore, can be trained as mount; 2 Ocher — toxic, DC 12 CON on touch or ill 1d4 rounds; 3 Silky — long fine hair, AC 12; 4 Puce — acid spit +4 (near) 1d6 damage; 5 Red — aggressive, immune to morale checks; 6 Woolly — immune to cold; 7 Sea — can swim and breathe underwater; 8 Spiny — slam deals 1d10 damage.
